name: Alex Kidd in Miracle World
rom_name: Alex Kidd in Miracle World (USA, Europe, Brazil) (Rev 1).sms
description: Classic SMS platformer built into the console BIOS. Money/score and lives tracking.

lives.notes: Lives — inferred from Game Genie code 7EC-2F9-3B7. Needs live verification.

money.notes: Money/score at 0xC030. Source: cheat code community docs (FFC030). Needs verification.

score.notes: Player score at 0xC032. Source: cheat code docs. Needs verification.

notes: ⚠️ RAM addresses need live verification with RetroArch memory viewer
Game Genie codes use different address encoding — 0xC02F9 is decoded estimate
Money acts as the primary score metric in this game
Iconic SMS title — good nostalgia factor for tournament
Built into original SMS BIOS — everyone recognises it
